title: Phase 8.7 — Hardening Track index (master ticket; do not implement directly)
current_state: Phase 8.5 (R1-R10) closed structural debt accumulated through vibe-coding. A targeted code audit on 2026-05-24 surfaced 20 concrete issues across 6 root causes that 8.5 did not address: error redaction, silent-failure telemetry, Supabase thread safety, data retention, tool input validation, DB lifecycle, silent-fallback patterns.
structural_problem: Six root causes, not 20 unrelated bugs. Fixing each one in isolation would yield 20 patches with overlapping responsibilities. The right shape is 12 sequenced tickets in 3 phases: Foundations (additive modules) → Hardening (surgical fixes) → Retention (the unbounded-growth fix).
target_state: All 12 sub-tickets closed. New modules: agent/redaction.py, agent/observability.py, agent/retention.py. New passive skill: silent_failure_watcher. New ADR: ADR-006 retention architecture. Existing modules patched in place: tools_telegram.py (redaction), pi_agent.py (god isolation + atomic refresh + truncation surfacing + DB discipline), tools_memory.py (thread safety + L3 cap + observability hooks), agent/tools.py (input validation), turn_log.py + evolution.py (streaming reads).
files_affected: See individual tickets T-102 through T-113
audit_refs: 20 audit items mapped: see audit_to_ticket table in design_notes
design_notes: PHASE 8.7.A — Foundations (T-102, T-103, T-104). Pure additions; closes audit #1-#7. Verify gate: 734 tests still PASS after each.
PHASE 8.7.B — Hardening (T-105, T-106, T-107, T-108). Surgical fixes using the foundations; closes audit #8, #9, #15, #16, #17, #18, #19.
PHASE 8.7.C — Retention (T-109, T-110, T-111, T-112, T-113). The biggest piece; closes audit #10-#14, #20. ADR-006 + 14th passive skill ship here.

SEQUENCING RATIONALE: A before B because B's fixes use safe_error + track_silent. B before C because retention deletes data; need DB connection discipline + Supabase thread safety bulletproof first. Each phase shippable independently — verify.py stays green between phases.
WHAT STAYS THE SAME: ModeConfig dataclass, ToolSpec registry, 3-segment prompt cache, L3→L2 cascade in memory_read, sprint runner. Phase 8.7 is purely hardening; existing architecture sound.
EXIT CRITERIA FOR PHASE 8.7: all 12 sub-tickets closed; verify.py PASS; passive_daily_digest reports 14 skills with no FAIL; ADR-006 in docs/adr/; PI.md §6 (skill inventory) refreshed to 14

NON-GOALS: refactoring working architecture; adding features; chasing the remaining 159 swallowed exceptions beyond the 4 audit-flagged ones (track_silent is in place for those who want to migrate them gradually)
success_criteria: 20 audit items all addressed (see audit_to_ticket mapping)
verify.py PASS at every phase boundary (A, B, C)
No regression in production tool count (64) or test count (734 + new tests from this phase)
ADR-006 + passive skill 14 visible in docs and reports
Phase 8.7 sprint note in vault/notes/sprints/ closing the milestone
risk_notes: The biggest risk is over-scope creep: turning targeted hardening into a refactor. Mitigation: each sub-ticket has a tight files_affected list and explicit non-goals. Sonnet session implementing should resist 'while I'm here let me also' refactors — they fork into new tickets, not creep into these.
migration_plan: Phase 8.7.A — execute T-102, T-103, T-104 in order. Run verify.py after each. Estimated 8h total.
Phase 8.7.B — execute T-105, T-106, T-107, T-108. Order is loose; T-105 first because it touches the most files. Estimated 10-12h.

Phase 8.7.C — execute T-109 first (the engine), then T-110 (streaming readers depend on archive layout), T-111 (independent), T-112 (wires T-109 into runtime), T-113 (final cap including ADR). Estimated 14-18h.
After T-113: run scripts/refresh_pi.py + scripts/verify.py + /passive. Commit work as 'Phase 8.7 complete'.
Update memory/project_current_state.md with the new architecture facts (redaction module, observability ledger, retention policies, new env vars).
test_plan: Phase 8.7.A gate: verify.py PASS with new modules importable and new tests green
Phase 8.7.B gate: verify.py PASS; 10-thread Supabase stress test green; awareness atomicity test green
Phase 8.7.C gate: verify.py PASS; retention dry-run produces correct policy summary; passive_daily_digest reports skill 14
